identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a cinematic, immersive, and frictionless movie-picking experience.
principles: Fusion: Tinder mechanics x Cinema aesthetics
Content is King: The Movie Poster is the Hero
Dark Mode Only: It's a movie app, turn the lights off.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle film grain overlay (opacity 0.03) on the background.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Glow effects instead of standard drop shadows. box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(229, 9, 20, 0.3)

layout.grid_system: Mobile-first. Single column for swipe view. Bento grid for 'Room Dashboard'.
layout.spacing: Generous padding (p-6, p-8). Content should breathe.

MovieCard.description: The hero element. 2:3 aspect ratio. Rounded corners (rounded-xl).
MovieCard.style: Full cover image. Gradient overlay at bottom for text readability. 'Projector Glow' behind the active card.
MovieCard.interaction: Swipe gestures (Framer Motion). Rotation and scale on drag.

Buttons.primary: bg-cinema-red text-white rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(229,9,20,0.5)]
Buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full hover:bg-white/10

Inputs.style: bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cinema-red focus:border-transparent h-12

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for the main background. Use solid #050505 with grain.
DO NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Anton'.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid.
Dark mode is the ONLY mode.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a 'MovieMatch' app. Focus on the 'Swipe' interaction feeling physical and fun. The 'Match' screen should feel like a celebration. Use the provided image URLs for backgrounds and placeholders. Implement the 'Anton' font for all major headings to give it that movie poster feel.
